'''âv-v-dh''' ('''kavavadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:moist|moist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-v-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:moist|moist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-v-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kavavadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivavadh|thivavadh]] || [[word:jivavadh|jivavadh]] || [[word:shivavadh|shivavadh]] || [[word:kivavadh|kivavadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvavadh|thuthuvavadh]] || [[word:jujuvavadh|jujuvavadh]] || [[word:shushuvavadh|shushuvavadh]] || [[word:kukuvavadh|kukuvavadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvavadh|thuvavadh]] || [[word:juvavadh|juvavadh]] || [[word:shuvavadh|shuvavadh]] || [[word:kuvavadh|kuvavadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvavadh|thuvavadh]] || [[word:juvavadh|juvavadh]] || [[word:shuvavadh|shuvavadh]] || [[word:kuvavadh|kuvavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevavadh|thevavadh]] || [[word:jevavadh|jevavadh]] || [[word:shevavadh|shevavadh]] || [[word:kevavadh|kevavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovavadh|thothovavadh]] || [[word:jojovavadh|jojovavadh]] || [[word:shoshovavadh|shoshovavadh]] || [[word:kokovavadh|kokovavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovavadh|thovavadh]] || [[word:jovavadh|jovavadh]] || [[word:shovavadh|shovavadh]] || [[word:kovavadh|kovavadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovavadh|thovavadh]] || [[word:jovavadh|jovavadh]] || [[word:shovavadh|shovavadh]] || [[word:kovavadh|kovavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvavadh|thĂŠvavadh]] || [[word:jĂŠvavadh|jĂŠvavadh]] || [[word:shĂŠvavadh|shĂŠvavadh]] || [[word:kĂŠvavadh|kĂŠvavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavavadh|thathavavadh]] || [[word:jajavavadh|jajavavadh]] || [[word:shashavavadh|shashavavadh]] || [[word:kakavavadh|kakavavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavavadh|thavavadh]] || [[word:javavadh|javavadh]] || [[word:shavavadh|shavavadh]] || [[word:kavavadh|kavavadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavavadh|thavavadh]] || [[word:javavadh|javavadh]] || [[word:shavavadh|shavavadh]] || [[word:kavavadh|kavavadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shavavadh|shavavadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshavavadh|goshavavadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishavavadh|gokishavavadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shavavadhnĂŒ|shavavadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshavavadhnknĂŒ|goshavavadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavadhnĂŒ|gokishavavadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shavavadhshĂ«|shavavadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkshĂ«|goshavavadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishavavadhshĂ«|gokishavavadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavadhro|shavavadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkro|goshavavadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavadhro|gokishavavadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavadhmu|shavavadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkmu|goshavavadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavadhmu|gokishavavadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shavavadhsher|shavavadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshavavadhnksher|goshavavadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishavavadhsher|gokishavavadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shavavadhng|shavavadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkng|goshavavadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishavavadhng|gokishavavadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shavavadhya|shavavadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkya|goshavavadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishavavadhya|gokishavavadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shavavadhyam|shavavadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkyam|goshavavadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishavavadhyam|gokishavavadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavavadhnĂŒshĂ«|shavavadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavavadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshavavadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavavadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishavavadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavadhnĂŒro|shavavadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavadhnknĂŒro|goshavavadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavadhnĂŒro|gokishavavadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavadhnĂŒmu|shavavadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavadhnknĂŒmu|goshavavadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavadhnĂŒmu|gokishavavadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavavadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shavavadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshavavadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishavavadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavadhshĂ«ro|shavavadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkshĂ«ro|goshavavadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavadhshĂ«ro|gokishavavadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavadhshĂ«mu|shavavadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkshĂ«mu|goshavavadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavadhshĂ«mu|gokishavavadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavavadhronĂŒ|shavavadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkronĂŒ|goshavavadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavadhronĂŒ|gokishavavadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavavadhroshĂ«|shavavadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkroshĂ«|goshavavadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavavadhroshĂ«|gokishavavadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shavavadhromu|shavavadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkromu|goshavavadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishavavadhromu|gokishavavadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shavavadhmunĂŒ|shavavadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkmunĂŒ|goshavavadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishavavadhmunĂŒ|gokishavavadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shavavadhmushĂ«|shavavadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkmushĂ«|goshavavadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishavavadhmushĂ«|gokishavavadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shavavadhmuro|shavavadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshavavadhnkmuro|goshavavadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishavavadhmuro|gokishavavadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
